query: Implement the simplest available Beads maintenance task in this harness. Claim it, make the minimal change, validate, and hand off.
expected_skill_contribution: The implement recipe should claim atomically before editing, emit a Scoped plan, make a minimal change, validate, close the bead, and report the full handoff — not just make the edit.
fixture_intent: Validates the core implement protocol: atomic claim before mutation, Scoped plan declaration, minimal change, validation step, and structured handoff with bead + files + git + risks.
baseline_gaps: Makes file edits without first claiming the Beads issue atomically
Skips the Scoped plan declaration before the first mutating command
Omits validation and produces an incomplete handoff missing bead status or git state
expected_behavior: Claims a bead with `bd update <id> --claim --json` before any file write command
States a `Scoped plan:` section listing the target file and the nature of the change before editing
Runs validation (recipe validate or skill check depending on what changed) and reports pass or fail
Closes the bead and reports: bead status, files changed, validation result, git status, and remaining risks

query: Implement the bead scoped to the `code-review` skill — write a failing test for the change first, then implement, then verify coverage.
expected_skill_contribution: The implement recipe should enforce TDD: write failing test first (RED), then minimal implementation (GREEN), then verify, before closing the bead.
fixture_intent: Validates that the implement recipe enforces the RED→GREEN→REFACTOR TDD cycle, confirming a test fails before implementation code is written and reporting coverage alongside the handoff.
baseline_gaps: Writes implementation code before or without writing a failing test first
Skips confirmation that the test fails before writing implementation (no RED phase evidence)
Reports no coverage metric or test-pass count in the handoff
expected_behavior: Claims the bead with `bd update <id> --claim --json` before any file edit
Writes a failing test first and explicitly confirms the test fails (RED phase) before writing any implementation code
Writes the minimal implementation to make the test pass and confirms GREEN phase
Reports coverage percentage or test-pass count alongside the bead close and handoff

query: Implement the recipe change scoped to `harness-review.yaml`, write tests, validate the recipe, close the bead, and ensure no blast radius beyond the scoped file.
expected_skill_contribution: The recipe should enforce minimal blast radius: edit only the scoped file, validate the recipe, verify no other recipe broke, close bead with full handoff.
fixture_intent: Validates that the implement recipe enforces scoped blast radius by editing only the declared file, validates the changed recipe plus dependents, and produces a complete handoff with all required fields.
baseline_gaps: Edits additional files beyond the scoped one without explicit justification
Validates only the changed recipe and skips checking dependent or sibling recipes for breakage
Produces an incomplete handoff that omits the bead ID close confirmation or file change list
expected_behavior: Edits only `.goose/recipes/harness-review.yaml` — any additional file touch is explicitly justified in the Scoped plan
Runs `goose recipe validate .goose/recipes/harness-review.yaml` and reports the exact pass/fail result
Optionally validates dependent or sibling recipes to confirm no blast radius breakage, reporting results
Closes the bead and reports: bead ID→closed, exact list of files changed, validation passed/failed, and git status
